Package de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt

Class HeapLDT

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt.LDT
de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt.HeapLDT
All Implemented Interfaces:
Named
public final class HeapLDT extends LDT
LDT responsible for the "Heap" sort, and the associated "Field" sort. Besides offering the usual LDT functionality, this class is also responsible for creating and managing the constant symbols representing fields.

      public static String getPrettyFieldName(Named fieldSymbol)

    • getSortOfSelect

      public Sort getSortOfSelect(Operator op)
      If the passed operator is an instance of "select", this method returns the sort of the function (identical to its return type); otherwise, returns null.

    • getFieldSymbolForPV

      public JFunction getFieldSymbolForPV(LocationVariable fieldPV, Services services)
      Given a "program variable" representing a field or a model field, returns the function symbol representing the same field. For normal fields (Java or ghost fields), this function symbol is a constant symbol of type "Field". For model fields, it is an observer function symbol. If the appropriate symbol does not yet exist in the namespace, this method creates and adds it to the namespace as a side effect.

    • containsFunction

      public boolean containsFunction(Function op)
      Overrides:
      containsFunction in class LDT

    • isResponsible

      public boolean isResponsible(Operator op, Term[] subs, Services services, ExecutionContext ec)
      Description copied from class: LDT
      returns true if the LDT offers an operation for the given java operator and the logic subterms
      Specified by:
      isResponsible in class LDT
      Parameters:
      op - the de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.Operator to translate
      subs - the logic subterms of the java operator
      services - the Services
      ec - the ExecutionContext in which the expression is evaluated
      Returns:
      true if the LDT offers an operation for the given java operator and the subterms

    • isResponsible

      public boolean isResponsible(Operator op, Term left, Term right, Services services, ExecutionContext ec)

      returns true if the LDT offers an operation for the given binary java operator and the logic subterms
      Specified by:
      isResponsible in class LDT
      Parameters:
      op - the de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.Operator to translate
      left - the left subterm of the java operator
      right - the right subterm of the java operator
      services - the Services
      ec - the ExecutionContext in which the expression is evaluated
      Returns:
      true if the LDT offers an operation for the given java operator and the subterms

      public boolean isResponsible(Operator op, Term sub, TermServices services, ExecutionContext ec)

      Specified by:
      isResponsible in class LDT
      Parameters:
      op - the de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.Operator to translate
      sub - the logic subterms of the java operator
      services - the Services
      ec - the ExecutionContext in which the expression is evaluated
      Returns:
      true if the LDT offers an operation for the given java operator and the subterm
